testcase.name: 7. FUNCTIONAL REALITY CHECK › Dashboard shows REAL data vs mock placeholders
testcase.system-out: === DASHBOARD REALITY CHECK === ⚠ Found placeholder: "John Doe" Found 4 metric cards ⚠ Suspicious static data in metric 1: "Active Models12+2..." ⚠ Suspicious static data in metric 2: "Running Backtests30..." ⚠ Suspicious static data in metric 3: "Open Positions5-1..." ⚠ Suspicious static data in metric 4: "Total P&L+$2,847+$127..." Testing for real-time updates... Real-time updates detected: false Placeholder patterns found: 1 Specific placeholders: John Doe

testcase.name: 7. FUNCTIONAL REALITY CHECK › Market data shows LIVE prices vs static mockups
testcase.system-out: === MARKET DATA REALITY CHECK === Found 1 data tables Bid/Ask elements found: 17 Total prices found: 0 Unique prices: 0 Uniqueness ratio: NaN (should be close to 1.0 for real data) Realistic forex prices found: 0

testcase.name: 7. FUNCTIONAL REALITY CHECK › Trading console shows REAL account data vs placeholder values
testcase.system-out: === TRADING CONSOLE REALITY CHECK === Balance elements found: 12 ⚠ Found suspicious account value: 10000 Trading form exists: true ✓ Trading form has symbol selection Quantity input - placeholder: "null", value: "10000" Position tables found: 0 Order tables found: 0 Suspicious account values: 1

testcase.name: 7. FUNCTIONAL REALITY CHECK › API connectivity and backend integration
testcase.system-out: === BACKEND CONNECTIVITY CHECK === Total requests: 40 API calls: 0 Successful responses: 40 Error responses: 0 LocalStorage contents: [] Has authentication data: false ⚠ NO API CALLS DETECTED - Platform may be purely static

testcase.name: 7. FUNCTIONAL REALITY CHECK › ML and advanced features functionality check
testcase.system-out: === ML FEATURES REALITY CHECK === ML/Training elements found: 40 Backtesting elements found: 37 Charts/visualizations found: 30 Signal-related elements found: 28
